key_risks: Hotter-than-expected CPI on June 10 could pressure equities broadly
PPI release on June 11 may increase volatility in rate-sensitive sectors
Recent equity weakness may extend if risk appetite deteriorates

portfolio.rationale: Oil at $90+ and positive recent sector returns amid sticky inflation data.
Resilient to rate environment with recent positive performance and stable labor data.
Defensive qualities ahead of CPI and PPI releases within the scoring window.

portfolio_rationale: Allocates to sectors showing recent strength and relative resilience to near-term inflation prints and labor stability.
rationale_summary: Energy, financials, and healthcare positioned for one-week window given high oil, rate backdrop, and upcoming data releases.
